steps.t: Anborn has asked for help filling water-skins in Haerondir. First, find an empty bucket to fill with water.
Anborn has asked for help filling water-skins in Haerondir. Fill the empty bucket with water at the Haerondir water source.
Anborn has asked for help filling water-skins in Haerondir. Use the full bucket to fill water-skins.
Anborn has asked for help packing up Haerondir supplies for the march. You should collect weapons from weapon racks and collect armour from barrels.
Anborn can be found in Haerondir. You should speak with Anborn.
